infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app requires access to the camera for augmented reality experiences
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app requires access to the microphone for AR experiences
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app requires access to your photos to save AR captures
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app requires permission to save photos of your AR experiences

ios.cameraUsagePermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses your camera for augmented reality experiences.
ios.microphoneUsagePermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) uses your microphone for AR experiences.
ios.photosPermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your photos to save AR captures.
ios.savephotosPermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs permission to save photos from your AR experiences.
